data.title: REPEAT – Drilling at Swanson Gold Deposit Confirms Large-Scale Gold Discovery with 1.18 g/t Au over 255.04 metres and 1.65 g/t Au over 136.01 metres
data.description: LaFleur Minerals Inc. has reported promising drilling results at the Swanson Gold Project, showcasing the discovery of new zones rich in gold. These findings reveal the presence of extensive and uninterrupted areas filled with gold, indicating a substantial find for the company.

data.title: FINBOA Named Double Finalist for 2026 Banking Tech Awards
data.description: In an announcement on April 22, 2026 in Houston, FINBOA, Inc. was acknowledged for its excellence in the 'Best of RegTech' and 'Best-as-a-Service' fields. The company specializes in process automation specifically catered to regulatory compliance within financial institutions. It was honored to be selected as a finalist in both categories within this competitive industry.

data.title: Upstart Announces Multi-Year $1.2B Forward-Flow Agreement with Centerbridge Partners, L.P.
data.description: Upstart Holdings, Inc., a prominent AI lending marketplace based in San Mateo, California, shared news of a significant partnership today. Funds managed by Centerbridge Partners, L.P., specializing in private equity, private credit, and real estate investing, have committed to acquiring up to $1.2 billion worth of consumer loans generated via the Upstart platform. This collaboration marks a substantial leap for Upstart as it continues to expand its presence in the lending industry.

data.title: Interview Click Launches Free Platform Where Journalists' Questions and Experts' Answers Are Publicly Shared and Searchable
data.description: A recent development in the journalism industry is reshaping the process of connecting journalists with sources, as well as facilitating expert opinions in media coverage. Interview Click, a no-cost platform launched by Broadcast Interview Source, Inc., enables journalists to submit inquiries, which experts can answer publicly. This innovative approach streamlines the sourcing process and fosters greater transparency in media interactions. The service has gained significant traction since its launch, with a notable increase in the number of journalists using the platform to engage with experts.

data.title: $500,000 Michael F. Price Memorial Grant from DeGregorio Family Foundation Awarded for Novel Gastroesophageal Cancer Therapy
data.description: In a recent announcement made on April 22, 2026, the DeGregorio Family Foundation in partnership with the Torrey Coast Foundation has granted a generous amount of $250,000 to Timothy C. Wang, MD. Dr. Wang holds the esteemed positions of Chief in the Division of Digestive and Liver Diseases, Silberberg Professor of Medicine in the Department of Medicine, and Irving Cancer.

data.title: Marshall Gerstein Elects Randy Rueth as Managing Partner, Marking Transition from Jeff Sharp's 24 Years of Leadership
data.description: Recently, Marshall, Gerstein & Borun LLP disclosed the appointment of Randall (Randy) G. Rueth as the new Managing Partner, taking over from Jeffrey S. Sharp, who held the position for 24 years. The transition officially took place on April 13, 2026. Randy is now set to lead the firm, bringing his expertise and experience to the role. This change marks a significant shift in leadership at the firm, indicating a new chapter in its development.

data.title: Sunny Bliss Plumbing & Air encourages homeowners to get HVAC and plumbing systems ready for summer
data.description: Miami's Sunny Bliss Plumbing & Air, a top home plumbing and HVAC solutions provider, is urging homeowners to take steps to enhance HVAC efficiency and tackle water-related issues as temperatures rise. This advice comes as temperatures increase rapidly in Miami, reaching high levels as early as April 22, 2026. Sunny Bliss Plumbing & Air emphasizes the importance of these actions to maintain comfort levels at home during warmer weather.

data.title: SKYX Signs Additional Agreement with Prominent European Development Group to Deploy and Market Its Technologies to Vast European Hospitality Market of Over 132,000 Hotels
data.description: SKYX has recently entered into a new agreement with a well-known European development group to introduce and promote their innovative technologies within the expansive European hospitality sector. This partnership is set to facilitate the deployment and marketing of SKYX's products to a wide range of businesses in the European hospitality industry. This strategic move is expected to significantly increase the reach of SKYX's technologies and expand their presence in the market. With this collaboration, SKYX aims to tap into the vast European hospitality market, which has a substantial potential for growth and innovation. This new agreement highlights SKYX's commitment to expanding its market share and leveraging opportunities in the European region.

data.title: DEADLINE THIS WEEK: Berger Montague Advises Navan, Inc. (NASDAQ: NAVN) Investors to Contact the Firm Before April 24, 2026
data.description: In a report on April 22, 2026, renowned law firm Berger Montague PC revealed a class action lawsuit against Navan, Inc. (NASDAQ: NAVN) for investors who bought or gained Navan stocks between October 28. The lawsuit targets Navan for alleged misconduct during that period, seeking to protect the rights of affected investors.

data.title: Two Pennsylvania Lawmakers Defy Political Norms, Building Friendship, Faith, and Bipartisan Results
data.description: In a recent podcast episode of Liz's Coffee Connection, a unique partnership between two lawmakers from Pennsylvania, hailing from opposing political parties, has caught the public eye. Amidst a time of heightened division in politics, their collaboration is proving to be a beacon of hope. The duo's unconventional alliance aims to bridge deep divides and promote unity in a landscape overshadowed by discord. The episode serves as a platform to showcase this innovative partnership, shedding light on their efforts to find common ground despite ideological differences. This remarkable initiative has garnered significant traction, emphasizing the importance of cooperation and understanding across party lines in today's political climate.

data.title: Parks Associates: Roku (28%) and Samsung (23%) Dominate Connected TV Platforms, Controlling Access to Streaming Audiences in the US Market
data.description: Recent data revealed that in the US, Amazon, LG, and Vizio have smaller market shares as platform dominance influences content discovery, advertising, and monetization strategies. The research conducted by Parks Associates in Plano, Texas in April 2026 through their Streaming Video Tracker indicates a notable trend in how connected TV platforms are evolving. The specific statistics on market shares were not provided in the summary.

data.title: Technosylva Introduces First-of-Its-Kind Urban Conflagration Modeling for the Built Environment
data.description: Technosylva, based in La Jolla, California, announced on April 22, 2026, that they have made important improvements in providing essential fire intelligence in wildland-urban interface areas. These enhancements are aimed at assisting utilities and emergency agencies in safeguarding lives and infrastructure. As a leading figure in wildfire and extreme weather knowledge, Technosylva is working to improve the effectiveness of their services. The developments are expected to significantly impact the understanding and management of wildfires, potentially leading to a decrease in damages and casualties.

data.title: Entreprenista Brings Hundreds of Women Founders to Palm Beach Gardens for Immersive Annual Founders Weekend Retreat
data.description: Over 300 innovative female entrepreneurs are set to convene in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida for a three-day event focused on networking, learning, and building a supportive community. The Entreprenista League, a leading membership organization for driven women business owners, reveals the comeback of its annual gathering.

data.title: Aurise Foundation Launches XAUE, Unlocking Yield for RWA Gold
data.description: In Panama City on April 22, 2026, the Aurise Foundation introduced XAUE, a new yield-bearing gold token. This token is created as a Treasury Layer for Tether Gold (XAU₮) and is specifically targeted towards qualified institutional participants. XAUE aims to incorporate crypto-native yield generation features into the traditional gold market.

data.title: Algenesis Labs Achieves ISO 14001 Certification, Strengthening Commitment to Sustainable Manufacturing
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in San Diego, Algenesis Labs, a company specializing in sustainable materials and creator of the acclaimed Soleic® polyurethane technology, revealed its achievement of ISO 14001:2015 certification for their Environmental Management System (EMS). This certification highlights the company's commitment to environmental responsibility.
